product_overview: PackIQ helps businesses optimize packaging and shipments using AI-driven box recommendations, a catalog of boxes/products, shipment tracking, subscription management, and account settings inside a unified dashboard.
core_goals: Generate optimized box recommendations for products or bulk CSV uploads to reduce void space and shipping costs
Manage product and box catalog entries and add new items with dimensional specs
Monitor shipment status and view shipment timelines for active parcels
View and manage plan details, billing history, and invoices
Configure account and company settings (profile, notifications, security, appearance)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-in and sign-up flows that grant access to the authenticated dashboard and onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Land on /dashboard
Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill in registration fields -> Submit signup form -> Land on /onboarding
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in wrong password -> Submit login form -> See an authentication error message

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Initial company and profile setup that collects required company details so the user can begin using the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Enter company name and basic profile details -> Complete required setup steps -> Land on /dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Main metrics overview showing KPI cards and recent optimization history to provide quick insights into packaging performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See KPI metric cards for savings and usage -> See recent optimization history section

features.name: AI Optimization
features.description: Create packaging optimization jobs by entering products manually or uploading CSVs and review the AI-recommended box results with a 3D wireframe preview.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/optimization -> Add product rows manually -> Run optimization -> View 3D box wireframe results
Navigate to /dashboard/optimization -> Toggle to CSV upload mode -> Drag and drop CSV file -> Run optimization -> View 3D box wireframe results
Navigate to /dashboard/optimization -> Toggle to CSV upload mode -> Drag and drop an invalid CSV (malformed or missing required columns) -> See a CSV validation error message

features.name: Live Tracking
features.description: Inspect real-time shipment cards, filter by status, search by tracking number, and open shipment timelines for detailed status history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/tracking -> See a grid of shipment cards with carrier and status information
Navigate to /dashboard/tracking -> Filter by In Transit -> See only In Transit shipment cards
Navigate to /dashboard/tracking -> Search by tracking number -> See matching shipment card(s) -> Open a shipment card to view the timeline

features.name: Catalog Manager
features.description: Browse and manage box and product catalog entries in grid or list view, view 3D dimensions for items, and add new catalog items via a form.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> See catalog items displayed in a grid with name, dimensions, and material
Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> Toggle between Grid and List view -> See the layout switch to the selected view
Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> Search catalog items -> See filtered results matching the search
Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> Open Add Item modal -> Fill required item fields and submit form -> See the new item in the catalog

features.name: Subscription Management
features.description: View current plan, usage, billing history, and perform plan toggles or initiate an upgrade flow; download past invoices as PDFs.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> See current plan hero card with active status and usage progress bar
Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> Toggle Annual billing -> See plan prices update to reflect annual pricing
Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> Scroll to Billing History -> Download a PDF invoice from the history table

features.name: Settings Dashboard
features.description: Manage profile, company, security, notifications, integrations, appearance, and destructive actions from a categorized settings interface.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> See settings sidebar with category items -> See Profile panel with name and email fields
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to Notifications panel -> Toggle a notification setting -> See the toggle state change
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Modify Full Name -> See unsaved changes warning -> Save changes -> See Saved confirmation state
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to Danger Zone -> Type the account confirmation text to confirm a destructive action -> Submit confirmation to proceed

routes.description: Initial company setup and profile completion
Main metrics overview and quick actions
Performance metrics and CO2 savings visualization

features.name: AI Optimization
features.description: Manual or bulk CSV upload for packaging optimization with 3D results.

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Sortable data table with detailed order drawers and 3D previews.
user_interactions: Click table row to open detail drawer

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: KPI cards and interactive charts showing optimization impact.

features.name: Live Tracking
features.description: Real-time shipment tracking cards with status timelines.
user_interactions: Click shipment card for timeline view

features.name: Catalog Manager
features.description: Grid/List view of boxes and products with 3D specs.
user_interactions: Toggle between Grid and List view
Open "Add Item" modal and fill form

features.name: Subscription Management
features.description: Billing history and plan upgrades with usage tracking.
user_interactions: Download PDF invoice from history table

features.name: Settings Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive profile, security, and appearance settings.
user_interactions: Upload profile avatar or company logo
Type confirmation for Danger Zone actions

known_limitations.issue: 2FA and Integrations are simulated UI flows
known_limitations.impact: Real 2FA setup and App connections not fully functional
